blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Requires mocked get_price NaN/Inf/negative outputs; not directly reproducible via API user surface in this run.
Requires induced transient internal exceptions to validate retry behavior; not directly reproducible via API user surface in this run.
Requires inspection of internal get_price(skip_cache=...) kwarg forwarding; not directly observable from HTTP responses.
Requires inspection of internal get_price(silent=...) kwarg forwarding; not directly observable from HTTP responses.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Flow Validator Guidance: API (curl)' section with isolation and parallel-safety boundaries for flow validators.
Documented unresolvable-token testing quirk: zero address fails fast while some dead addresses can hit nginx 120s proxy timeout and briefly trigger downstream 502s.
